description_long: This house features a modern, minimalist design with clean lines and a flat roof. The exterior is primarily clad in light-colored stone or concrete panels, contrasted by sections of exposed red brick, particularly around the central staircase and vertical core. Large, floor-to-ceiling windows framed in black metal provide ample natural light and a sense of openness, especially on the front and side facades. The structure includes two above-ground stories, with an open staircase visible through the glass, connecting the levels. The front entryway is sheltered by an overhanging roof and supported by slender columns, leading up a broad set of steps. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, with an emphasis on geometric forms and functional spaces.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, light stone cladding, red brick accents, and large black-framed windows. The design features a prominent open staircase and a sheltered entryway.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entryway, broad steps, large windows, and the central red brick staircase core.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the overhanging roof, the brick staircase, and the solid wall with minimal window openings.
description_view_2: The rear view displays mostly solid wall surfaces with minimal fenestration and the flat roof extending across the structure.
description_view_3: The right side view reveals the vertical brick core, side windows, and the continuation of the flat roof and overhang.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large vertical strips and floor-to-ceiling windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with broad steps, sheltered by a flat overhang supported by slender columns, and large glass panels.
